error.signature: RuntimeError: cuDNN error: CUDNN_STATUS_EXECUTION_FAILED on RNN backward

verdict.summary: cuDNN RNN backward pass fails. Often caused by non-contiguous tensors or workspace memory exhaustion.

dead_ends.action: Disable cuDNN for all operations globally
dead_ends.why_fails: Disabling cuDNN causes 5-10x slowdown on convolutions and other operations unrelated to the RNN issue
Manual RNN implementations are much slower and lose cuDNN-optimized fused kernels

workarounds.action: Ensure input tensors are contiguous before passing to RNN
Reduce batch size to give cuDNN more workspace memory
Set torch.backends.cudnn.enabled=True but benchmark=False for deterministic mode
workarounds.how: torch.backends.cudnn.benchmark = False  # avoids workspace size instability
